title: Coinbase CEO reflects on controversial blog, state of the markets, 1000 unicorns, tax reform & more
description:
Show Notes:

0:00 Brian Armstrong follows up on his one-year old blog post "Coinbase is a mission focused company"

19:27 Authoritarianism on the left

33:04 Newsom's new vaccine mandate, NBA vaccine coverage, Merck COVID pill

45:51 Golden Age of VC, 1000 unicorns & the impact on private/public markets

57:45 Corporate tax reform, Roth IRAs & the "Peter Thiel Provision"

1:06:36 Chances of a VC bubble, why notable VCs are retiring, building a modern venture firm

1:23:51 All-In summit planning

analysis.summary: The episode features Brian Armstrong discussing his blog post on Coinbase being a mission-focused company, and the hosts cover various topics including authoritarianism, vaccine mandates, the Golden Age of VC, and tax reform. They also discuss the chances of a VC bubble and the impact of 1000 unicorns on private and public markets. The hosts share their insights on building a modern venture firm and planning for the All-In summit.

takeaways.text: Authoritarianism is a growing concern on the left
1000 unicorns are changing the private and public markets
Tax reform may force Peter Thiel to pull $5 billion from his IRA
The Golden Age of VC is minting billions for university endowments
Notable VCs are retiring due to the changing landscape
Building a modern venture firm requires adaptability

sentiment.notes: The hosts discuss both positive and negative topics, including the growth of VC and the concerns of authoritarianism, resulting in a mixed sentiment.

notable_moments.description: Brian Armstrong discusses his blog post on Coinbase
Authoritarianism on the left is discussed
The Golden Age of VC and 1000 unicorns are covered
